flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 53% at Eastern Oklahoma State College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (950 vs 2.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Eastern Oklahoma State College fell 23% between 2006 and 2009 (29.7% → 22.9%).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern Oklahoma State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).
